rules.description: CAPS_LOCK to HYPER (SHIFT+COMMAND+OPTION+CONTROL) or ESCAPE (If Alone)

manipulators.description: Avoid starting sysdiagnose with the built-in macOS shortcut cmd+shift+option+ctrl+,
Avoid starting sysdiagnose with the built-in macOS shortcut cmd+shift+option+ctrl+.

from.description: Avoid starting sysdiagnose with the built-in macOS shortcut cmd+shift+option+ctrl+/

rules.description: RIGHT_SHIFT to ESCAPE (If Alone) — Internal keyboard only
Right Option to Right Control (Hold) or Ctrl+B tmux prefix (Tap) — Internal keyboard only
Toggle caps_lock by pressing left_shift then right_shift
F7 / Rewind : Screenshot entire screen to clipboard (Cmd+Shift+Ctrl+3)
F8 / Play-Pause : Screenshot selection to clipboard (Cmd+Shift+Ctrl+4)
Hyper + Y/U/I/O/P == line/word navigation + forward delete
Hyper + D : Ctrl + X (to expand terminal)

manipulators.description: Escape exits command mode and sends Escape
g → Screenshot selection to clipboard (like F8)
b → Screenshot entire screen to clipboard (like F7)
Swallow unmapped punctuation and special keys
